---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Use Case

Describe the real-world scenario this would solve.

## Proposed Solution

If you have ideas on how to implement this:

- [ ] Which auth layer? (cookie / official API / OAuth UAT)
- [ ] New tool or enhancement to existing tool?
- [ ] Any Feishu API endpoint or protocol command involved?
